Auto Insurance

Comprehensive auto insurance coverage to protect you, your family, and your vehicles on New York roads. From required liability to full coverage protection.

Get Auto Quote Call (877) 717-7234

Get Your Free Quote

Auto Insurance Coverage Options

Customize your auto insurance policy with the coverage options that fit your needs and budget.

Liability Coverage

Required by New York state law. Covers bodily injury and property damage you cause to others in an accident.

  • • Bodily injury liability
  • • Property damage liability
  • • Legal defense costs
  • • NY minimum: 25/50/10

Collision Coverage

Pays for damage to your vehicle from collisions with other vehicles or objects, regardless of fault.

  • • Vehicle collision repairs
  • • Single-vehicle accidents
  • • Hit and run protection
  • • Deductible options available

Comprehensive Coverage

Protects your vehicle from non-collision events like theft, vandalism, fire, weather, and animal strikes.

  • • Theft and vandalism
  • • Weather damage (hail, flood)
  • • Fire and explosion
  • • Falling objects and animal hits

Uninsured/Underinsured Motorist

Protects you when the at-fault driver has no insurance or insufficient coverage to pay for your damages.

  • • Bodily injury protection
  • • Property damage coverage
  • • Hit-and-run accidents
  • • Highly recommended in NY

Personal Injury Protection (PIP)

Required in New York. Covers medical expenses and lost wages for you and passengers, regardless of fault.

  • • Medical expenses
  • • Lost wages coverage
  • • Rehabilitation costs
  • • Essential services

Rental Reimbursement & Roadside

Additional coverage for rental car costs while your vehicle is being repaired and emergency roadside assistance.

  • • Rental car reimbursement
  • • Towing services
  • • Battery jump-start
  • • Flat tire changes

Ways to Save on Auto Insurance

Take advantage of these discounts to reduce your auto insurance premiums

Multi-Car Discount

Save by insuring multiple vehicles on the same policy

Bundle & Save

Combine auto and home insurance for significant savings

Safe Driver

Maintain a clean driving record for lower premiums

Good Student

Students with good grades qualify for discounts

Anti-Theft Devices

Vehicle security systems can reduce premiums

Defensive Driving

Complete an approved course for premium reduction

Pay in Full

Save by paying your annual premium upfront

Low Mileage

Drive less than average? You may qualify for savings

New York Auto Insurance Requirements

Understanding minimum coverage requirements in New York State

$25,000

Bodily Injury per Person

$50,000

Bodily Injury per Accident

$10,000

Property Damage per Accident

Additional Required Coverage in NY

  • Personal Injury Protection (PIP): $50,000 minimum coverage for medical expenses and lost wages
  • Uninsured Motorist Coverage: Same limits as liability coverage to protect against uninsured drivers

We Recommend Higher Limits

While these are the minimum requirements, we strongly recommend higher liability limits (100/300/100 or higher) to adequately protect your assets. The difference in premium is often minimal compared to the additional protection.

Let us help you find the right auto insurance coverage at a competitive price. Get started today!
